summary: UX/UI Designer with hands-on experience designing healthcare and offline-first mobile applications. Skilled in user research, workflow analysis, wireframing, and interactive prototyping. Experienced in simplifying complex systems for low-technical-literacy users and collaborating with developers to deliver feasible design solutions.

experience.title: Research Assistant Intern (UX/UI focused)
experience.organization: University of Colombo School of Computing
responsibilities: Designed and prototyped a web-based healthcare communication platform addressing doctor-patient interaction challenges in physiotherapy.
Conducted user requirement gathering and secondary research to identify communication gaps in physiotherapy doctor-patient interactions.
Defined feature structure and user flows to improve clarity and reduce navigation friction.
Designed low- and mid-fidelity wireframes and interactive Figma prototypes focused on accessibility and empathy-driven interaction.
Collaborated with developers to ensure technical feasibility and smooth design-to-development handoff.

projects.project_name: UI/UX Design - Offline Fisheries Data Collection App
details: Designed an offline-first mobile application for fisheries officers operating in low-connectivity marine environments.
Conducted workflow analysis to identify data-entry inefficiencies in real fishing conditions.
Designed data input forms, filtering systems, and structured dashboards for supervisors.
Developed low- and high-fidelity prototypes tailored for low-technical-literacy users focused on usability and efficiency.
Improved data accuracy through simplified interaction flows.
Improved usability of the Department of Examinations Sri Lanka homepage.
Conducted heuristic evaluation to identify usability issues.
Restructured information architecture to reduce navigation complexity.
Categorized service options into clear task-based groupings.
Designed low-fidelity redesign prototypes to improve accessibility and user efficiency.
Reduced visual clutter and improved task completion flow.

education.qualification: BSc in (Physical Science) Information & Communication Technology

certificates.certificate: Foundations of User Experience (UX) Design by Google

references.name: Dr. D. Sandaruwan
references.title: Senior Lecturer
references.organization: University of Colombo School of Computing
